message:
fix: remove BD_BRANCH from session_manager and polecat_spawn

Remove DoltBranch field from SessionStartOptions, BD_BRANCH injection
into tmux startup commands, and BD_BRANCH SetEnvironment calls. Also
remove the DoltBranch pass-through in polecat_spawn.go StartSession().

Part of phase 2 BD_BRANCH removal (gt-bewatn.8).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
